steps.description: Add two new named tests at the end of the describe block that explicitly use jest.spyOn on audioManager.playWordEn

tests_to_add.name: plays audio via audioManager when round starts (not raw Audio)
tests_to_add.approach: jest.spyOn(audioManager, 'playWordEn').mockImplementation(() => {}); render component; assert spy called with path matching /\/audio\/en\/.*\.mp3/

tests_to_add.name: Play Again button calls audioManager.playWordEn
tests_to_add.approach: jest.spyOn(audioManager, 'playWordEn').mockImplementation(() => {}); render; spy.mockClear(); click 'Play Again / 再播放'; assert spy called once

steps.note: act() wrappers already present at lines 197, 215, 227. No timer fixes needed.

steps.description: Add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); }) after each match detection to flush the nested setTimeout(() => checkComplete(updated), 0) at MatchingPairs.tsx:91
steps.source_root_cause: MatchingPairs.tsx line 91 schedules `setTimeout(() => checkComplete(updated), 0)` inside a setCards callback triggered by the 400ms timeout. After the 400ms act() call, this 0ms timer is pending. If not flushed within act(), afterEach fires it outside act() causing state-update warnings.

locations_to_fix.fix: After act(advanceTimersByTime(400)) when match found (before break), add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); })

locations_to_fix.test: tapping a matched card is ignored
locations_to_fix.fix: After act(advanceTimersByTime(400)) when match found (before assertions), add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); })

locations_to_fix.test: updateWord called with correct wordId on match
locations_to_fix.fix: After act(advanceTimersByTime(400)) when match found (before break), add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); })

locations_to_fix.test: mismatched pair: cards revert isFlipped after timeout
locations_to_fix.fix: In the else branch (cards matched), add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); }) to flush checkComplete before test ends

locations_to_fix.test: onComplete fires when all pairs are matched
locations_to_fix.fix: In the while loop, after each 400ms advance when match is found, add act(() => { jest.advanceTimersByTime(0); }). Also add after the loop ends.

steps.description: ALREADY SATISFIED: Test 'retry creates a new Howl instance (Howl constructor called twice)' at lines 245-263 already verifies that clicking Retry creates a new Howl. The requirement is met.
steps.existing_test_summary: Renders SongTime → navigates to song-player → emits loaderror via lastHowlInstance.emit → clicks retry → asserts Howl constructor called twice.

steps.description: Add two new named tests aligned with requirement checker names. Existing tests (lines 170-180) stay as-is.

tests_to_add.name: shows child name in dashboard title when name is set
tests_to_add.approach: mockGetSetting.mockResolvedValue({ key: 'childName', value: 'Emma' }); render; await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByText(/Emma.*Progress|Emma.*进度/)).toBeInTheDocument())

tests_to_add.name: shows generic title when child name is not set
tests_to_add.approach: mockGetSetting.mockResolvedValue(undefined); render; await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByText(/Parent Dashboard|家长面板/)).toBeInTheDocument())

steps.note: Source renders `${childName}'s Progress / ${childName}的进度` or 'Parent Dashboard / 家长面板'.

steps.description: Add PIN bypass protection test BEFORE the existing test

test.name: direct navigation to /parent/dashboard redirects to PIN page
test.approach: page.goto('/parent/dashboard'); expect parent-pin-page visible; expect parent-dashboard NOT visible

updateWord called with correct wordId on match

onComplete fires when all pairs are matched

added: shows child name in dashboard title when name is set
shows generic title when child name is not set
direct navigation to /parent/dashboard redirects to PIN page

risk_areas.description: Adding act(() => jest.advanceTimersByTime(0)) in loop-based tests requires careful placement to avoid changing test semantics
Requires useParentAuth to redirect unauthenticated users navigating directly to /parent/dashboard back to /parent (where parent-pin-page lives). This behavior needs to exist in the source already.
audioManager.playWordEn is already jest.fn() via jest.mock(). jest.spyOn() on an already-mocked function works fine.
Bilingual regex needs to match the actual rendered text format: 'Emma\'s Progress / Emma的进度'

persistence_strategy: N/A — test-only changes, no data storage
